title: Module 1
content:
Introduction to Android: Android Architecture, Setting up Development
Environment, Basic Building blocks – Activities, Services, Broadcast
Receivers & Content providers, UI Components–Views & notifications,
Components for communication–Intents & Intent Filters

title: Module 2
content:
Application Structure:-Android Manifest.xml, uses-permission& uses-
sdk, Layouts & Drawable Resources, First sample Application, Emulator-
Android Virtual Device, Basic UI design, Styles &Themes
Android User Interface:-Measurements User Interface (UI) Components –
Editable and non-editable Text Views, Buttons, Radio and Toggle Buttons,
Checkboxes, Spinners, Dialog and pickers

title: Module 3
content:
Event Handling:–Handling clicks or changes of various UI components
Fragments :– Creating fragments, Lifecycle of fragments, Fragment states
Intent :– Using intents to launch Activities, explicitly starting new Activity,
Implicit Intents, Passing data to Intents, Getting results from Activities
Broadcast Receivers:- Types of broadcast receivers, creation of broadcast
receivers

title: Module 4
content:
Database:- Introduction to SQLite database, creating and opening a
database, creating tables, inserting retrieving and deleting data, Registering
Content Providers, Using content Providers (insert, delete, retrieve and
update)
IoT Communication Protocols:-Overview of MQTT, HTTP, and CoAP,
Implementing MQTT in Mobile Applications, Data Transmission
Techniques.
Interfacing Mobile Apps with IoT Devices:- Connecting Mobile Apps to
Sensors and Actuators, Using Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, and NFC for IoT
Communication, Practical Lab: Developing a Simple IoT Mobile App
Suggestion on Project Topics:
1. Android app for patient health monitoring
2. Android app for smart farming
3.  Android app for home automation
4. College Alert Application
5. Garbage Management System for Smart City
